title: EDUCATION SERVICES - 211info
text: CANBY CENTER EDUCATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides after school tutoring, reading mentors, and finance, cooking, and sewing life skills classes. Eligibility: Grades K-12 for after school tutoring, unrestricted for all other programs Hours: Varies by class Email (503) 266-2920 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 266-2920 Mimi Flores Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or visit website to complete interest form FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Aurora, Canby, and Hubbard TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Site under construction. Onsite services temporarily paused. Services: Life Skills Education Mentoring Programs Tutoring Services Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HARVEST SHARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
